sentences.text: Thank you for calling your management and real estate Group. Please listen to this message in its entirety office hours are Monday through Friday from nine, AM to five PM if this is an after hour emergency only please press two. If you are a current tenant and having maintenance request or a general question, please press zero. If you are calling for available rentals please press one.
